FBL_X62_APVU_V-1-2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 751
Recv ID: 771
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 07
Func Name: Lampes à décharge

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "T93",
    "soft": "2206",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "T93",
    "soft": "0300",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 39942,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {
      "Cyclic Ratio for Right Light": "0",
      "FBL Right State": "0",

    "name": "FBL droit"
  },

    "name": "Alimentation lampes"

  {

    "name": "Alimentation FBL"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39941,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "Traceability Year": "0",
      "Traceability Day": "0",
      "Traceability Day Number": "0",
      "FBL RMS Voltage": "0",
      "UCE RMS Voltage": "0"
    },
    "name": "ECU (Erreur Cheksum EEPROM ou Corruption RAM)"
  }
]

    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "50C0",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",

  },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 21,
    "replybytes": "61AA",
    "sentbytes": "21AA",
    "name": "DataRead FBL Configuration Parameters",
    "deny_sds": [
      "aftersales"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FBL Activation": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Thermal waiting activation": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Taking -Flashing indicator- information": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vmin to deactivate FBL": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vmin to activate FBL": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Light RMS voltage for alpha-min": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Light RMS voltage for alpha-max": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FBL Steering Angle Deactivation": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FBL Steering Angle Activation": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Lighting Temporisation (Vehicle stop)": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Speed min for detecting DTC": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Threshold Speed for reactivation after temporization end.": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Coefficient for steering scale": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Filtering Coefficient for steering scale": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
